action_set_definitions.name: get_account_quotas
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current usage and maximum limits for cloud resources (e.g., instances) in a specific region.

region.description: The cloud region to query, e.g., 'ap-northeast-1'.

action_set_definitions.name: get_hub_regional_config
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the operational status and drift information for a specific region within the management hub.

hub_name.description: The name of the management hub cluster.

action_set_definitions.name: configure_management_hub_region
action_set_definitions.description: Updates regional configuration on the management hub to enable regions or resolve API drift issues.

hub_name.description: The name of the management hub cluster.

resolve_drift.description: If true, synchronizes the hub state with the cloud provider to resolve inconsistencies.

action_set_definitions.name: list_fleet_resources
action_set_definitions.description: Lists all workload clusters managed by the hub, providing their names, current node counts, and status.

hub_name.description: The name of the management hub cluster.

action_set_definitions.name: apply_cluster_manifest
action_set_definitions.description: Uses GitOps protocols to create or update a workload cluster configuration. This tool can reduce node counts even when at quota limits to facilitate resource reallocation.

cluster_name.description: The name of the cluster to create or modify.

action_set_definitions.name: delete_workload_cluster
action_set_definitions.description: Completely removes a workload cluster and its associated resources from the cloud and the management plane to free up account quota.

cluster_name.description: The name of the cluster to delete.

action_set_definitions.name: get_cluster_health_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the real-time sync and health status for a specific workload cluster.

state_description.provisioned_resources: A list of all active cloud resources including their IDs, types, and current statuses (e.g., running, stopped).
state_description.network_topology: Mapping of VPCs, subnets, route tables, and security group rules.
state_description.account_quotas: Current limits and usage counts for resources like vCPUs, Elastic IPs, and storage volume size.
state_description.billing_status: Accumulated cost and pricing models applied to the current session.
